mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart_item (user_id, product_id, quantity, checked) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{checked})
mapper.update: UPDATE cart_item SET quantity = #{quantity}, checked = #{checked} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM cart_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
SELECT * FROM cart_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM cart_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.update: UPDATE cart_item SET checked = #{checked} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM cart_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND checked = 1 ORDER BY id DESC
